summary: PART I . Cohu, Inc. (Cohu, we, our, us and the Company) was founded in 1947 and is a global supplier of equipment and services optimizing semiconductor manufacturing yield and productivity. Cohus differentiated and broad product portfolio enables optimized yield and productivity, accelerating customers manufacturing time-to-market.
